speaker: narrator
text: There was an increase of around 2 degrees for the water outside… 10 degrees for you stupid yanks.

speaker: narrator
text:
This will add an unfortunate number of complications for our friends: the fish.
	These creatures, as close to us as they are, our sustainers, our friends, are assaulted on all sides by parasites.

speaker: narrator
text:
Chrisitna always wore earbuds when she was out. To ensure that no one,
	 absolutely no one had an inkling of an idea that she should be approached.

speaker: narrator
text:
Even now Blanche can tell that she's been up for hours already at (8 in the morning)
	 and she can smell that if she had showered in the intervening hours she hadn't done it well enough.
	 Layer after layer of defense.

speaker: blanche
text: I'll take the rods and the net.

speaker: blanche
text: Could you handle the… fishcooler and the bait?

speaker: narrator
text:
Christina sucks her teeth and puts her phone back into her pocket.
	 She's been watching her favorite v-tuber on the way to the park.

speaker: narrator
text:
The one benefit of this project was having an excuse to get up at ungodly hours
	 of the morning when she could just about catch the end of their livestreams.

speaker: narrator
text:
Tyresta National Park wasn’t the ideal place to do our research.
	They're both science undergrads going to Stockholm University paired together for a project  in a summer course.
	Unlike Chrisitina, Blanche had truly blossomed during her college years.

speaker: narrator
text:
Christina was always flabbergasted why someone like her needed to rush into the disappointments of adulthood.
	That you'd wish to be free of the university playground and instead fend for themselves as a full-blown working taxpayer …

speaker: blanche
text: Is that too much for you to carry?!

speaker: Christina
text: I'm just taking my time, it's nice out

speaker: narrator
text:
They reach the spot and set up the fish cooler and the maggot filled bait box,
	 TAKE it across the river opening to the sea, and wait for the little fish to bite.
